title: 60Pcs 12 Inch Gold & White Balloon Set - Metallic Golden & White Balloon Arch Kit Latex Helium Balloons for Wedding Anniversary Engagement Baby Shower Birthday Party Decorations Eid Mubarak Graduation
features: White Gold Balloon Sets: 20 x gold metallic balloons, 20 x White balloons, 20 x white balloons with gold confetti. 60 pieces in total. Enough quantity for you create a distinctive White and gold balloon arch garland kit or balloon bouquet to meet your usage scenarios.
Balloon Measurement: White and gold balloon kit are 12" (30cm) when fully inflated.
Premium Quality: These shiny and chrome 12 inches party balloons are made of high quality latex and are safe to use around children. You can fill these with air, water or helium.

How to Make a Confetti Balloon: For your convenience, our clear balloons are pre-filled with shiny confetti, you just rub the balloons on you hair, a towel or similar to get the confetti to stick to the sides and then enjoy your happy time.

Perfect Party Supplies: White and gold balloon arch can be used anywhere anytime by all ages. Add these vibrant colours to your party like Mother's Day, Bridal Showers, Halloween, Christmas, New Year’s day, Leaving Party, Hen Party, etc.
description: White Gold and White Balloons White and Gold Balloons Arch Kit Helium Balloons Latex Balloons White and Gold Party Decorations Birthday Decorations Anniversary Wedding Specifications: Material: Latex & plastic confetti Size: 12 Inches / 30 cm in diameter Wide Usage: gold and White party decorations Package included:20 x Chrome Gold Balloons Metallic Balloons20 x White Latex Balloons 20 x Gold Confetti Balloons Features: White and Gold Party Decorations: White and gold balloons decorations for galas, weddings, bridal showers, graduation, Christmas, spring festival, engagement parties, anniversaries, new years eve, wedding, birthday party, hen party decorations,nye decorations and so on. Perfect table center pieces, wall decor, displays, photo, makes your party attractive and romantic. How to Make a Confetti Balloon: White balloons filled with Gold confetti. As the gold confetti is heavier than the helium, will naturally moves toward the direction of gravity. So, before inflating the balloon, spray a little bit of water into the balloon and rub the confetti with your hands repeatedly to distribute them uniform inside the balloon, so that the moisture helps the pieces of gold confetti stick to the balloon.
